content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/src/lib/auth.ts:1	import { NextAuthOptions } from "next-auth";2	import CredentialsProvider from "next-auth/providers/credentials";3	import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";4	import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";5	6	export const authOptions: NextAuthOptions = {7	  session: {8	    strategy: "jwt",9	  },10	  providers: [11	    CredentialsProvider({12	      name: "Credentials",13	      credentials: {14	        email: { label: "Email", type: "email" },15	        password: { label: "Password", type: "password" },16	      },17	      async authorize(credentials) {18	        if (!credentials?.email || !credentials?.password) {19	          return null;20	        }21	22	        const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({23	          where: { email: credentials.email },24	        });25	26	        if (!user) {27	          return null;28	        }29	30	        const isPasswordValid = await bcrypt.compare(31	          credentials.password,32	          user.password33	        );34	35	        if (!isPasswordValid) {36	          return null;37	        }38	39	        return {40	          id: user.id,41	          email: user.email,42	          name: user.name,43	          role: user.role,44	        };45	      },46	    }),47	  ],48	  callbacks: {49	    async jwt({ token, user }) {50	      if (user) {51	        token.role = (user as any).role;52	        token.id = user.id;53	      }54	      return token;55	    },56	    async session({ session, token }) {57	      if (session.user) {58	        (session.user as any).role = token.role;59	        (session.user as any).id = token.id;60	      }61	      return session;62	    },63	  },64	  pages: {65	    signIn: "/auth/login",66	  },67	};
